printed.name: Scissors
printed.setup: Resting on shoulder girdle and upper arms, arms bent and parallel (as close as possible), hands holding pelvis, back arched, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed, reaching toward ceiling

movement.exhale: Open legs to Scissors position (2 pulses)

cues: Pass through the perpendicular position following each repetition
Create even V when legs are in Scissors position
